<details open>

fix: CUDA device PCI bus ID de-dupe OOMing (ignoring other 3 gpus entirely) (#22533)

* fix: CUDA device PCI bus ID detection for multi-GPU de-dupe

* HIP, MUSA macros

---------

Co-authored-by: Johannes Gäßler <johannesg@5d6.de>

</details>
